metric_results.label: Full run duration
metric_results.remediation_hint: Compare p95 runtime against warm/cold baseline and inspect slow stages.

parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero

metric_results.label: Final numeric OCR error count
metric_results.remediation_hint: Fix OCR errors that affect final reported numbers before export.

parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero

threshold_policy.rationale: Block final export until OCR-caused numeric errors are resolved.

metric_results.label: Material OCR failure rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect runtime traces, retry policy, fallback rates, artifact upload, and render telemetry.

parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero

metric_results.label: Telemetry quality stress score
metric_results.remediation_hint: Increase runtime trace coverage for latency, retrieval, upload, render, cost, retry, fallback, and OCR health.

parameters.rationale: Ceiling-resistant score: zero observed errors is insufficient when trace coverage is missing or only inferred from fallback artifacts.
parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero

threshold_policy.rationale: Increase runtime trace coverage for latency, retrieval, upload, render, cost, retry, fallback and OCR health.

metric_results.label: PDF render failures
metric_results.remediation_hint: Fix final PDF rendering failures before export.

parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero

metric_results.remediation_hint: Optimize render-only PDF generation and inspect final render telemetry.

parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero

metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect runtime traces, retry policy, fallback rates, artifact upload, and render telemetry.

parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero
